subject: [PATCH v3 19/20] iomap: pass iomap_iter_next_fn directly instead of struct iomap_ops

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch simplifies the iomap code by removing the struct iomap_ops, which only contained a single function pointer. Instead of passing an ops struct to functions like iomap_iter(), filesystems can pass their iomap_next() callback directly. This change is possible because all filesystems now implement ->iomap_next() and have removed legacy fallbacks. The patch also renames the 'ops' field in the iomap_iter tracepoint to 'next'.
